violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets to the low boy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Inspector provided during inspection. ). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The outside dumpsters are not covered due to missing covers. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
